label: sandbox_diagnostics • bare `pip install` redirects to sandbox_install
notes: A model ran `pip install numpy` directly in sandbox_exec instead of sandbox_install (manager:"pip"). Bare pip skips the per-agent venv bootstrap + retry harness and routinely fails (here exit 1). The self-heal hint must fire and point at sandbox_install so the venv-scoped install path applies.

sandboxDiagnostics.stderr: ERROR: Could not install packages due to an OSError: [Errno 13] Permission denied
